name: Cherry S'mores
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Comstock
Preparation Time: 0:10
1. Place one piece of the chocolate bar on each graham cracker square.
2. Microwave on HIGH for about 1 minute, until the chocolate starts to melt.
3. Place one marshmallow on each cracker.
4. Microwave for 15-20 seconds on HIGH, or until soft.
5. Top each with a spoonful of cherry pie filling.
6. Microwave on HIGH for an additional 15 seconds.
